Agile Brand Development

Brand & Identity Design

Brand concepts, naming, storytelling, and identity systems that keep your brand consistent and top of mind.

Book a strategy session

End-to-end brand development, delivered through structured sprints — from brand strategy and naming through visual identity, design systems, and brand guidelines. All work is platform-agnostic and handed off in Figma with full developer specifications, with two rounds of revisions built into every deliverable.

What this looks like

Messaging & Narrative System

A complete brand messaging architecture: core narrative, positioning statement, 3–5 value pillars, a messaging hierarchy from company to product to feature level, and tone-of-voice guidelines.

Visual Identity Evolution

An expansion of an existing identity system: a defined core palette with usage ratios, a visual motif system, photography direction, and motion principles — delivered as a Figma system and usage guide.

Brand Guidelines & Toolkit

The master reference for using the brand correctly: logo rules, color specifications, typography hierarchy, photography direction, and tone of voice — written as practical usage guidance.

Brand Enablement Sessions

Two facilitated sessions closing the gap between a guidelines document and confident real-world use: one for sales, one for leadership.

Master Deck / Pitch Deck

The primary branded presentation for sales and leadership — company story, product overview, differentiation, customer proof, next steps. Co-built with your marketing lead.

Channel Marketing Asset Kits

A complete set of branded templates organized for distribution channels — partners, resellers, regional teams: presentations, brochures, email templates, social assets, sell sheets.

Social Templates (Static + Motion)

A library of branded, editable templates for the most common social formats — built in Canva so your team can produce on-brand content without design software.

Part of Agile Brand Development

Give your brand a system that scales with you.

Book a strategy session
